The **Men's fours at the [2014 Commonwealth Games](/wiki/2014_Commonwealth_Games "2014 Commonwealth Games")**, was part of the [lawn bowls competition](/wiki/Lawn_bowls_at_the_2014_Commonwealth_Games "Lawn bowls at the 2014 Commonwealth Games"), which took place between 27 July and 1 August 2014 at the [Kelvingrove Lawn Bowls Centre](/wiki/Kelvingrove_Lawn_Bowls_Centre "Kelvingrove Lawn Bowls Centre").[[1]](#cite_note-CWG2014-1)
